column1: # Tigo Monitor partition table for 16 MB flash (e.g. ESP32-P4-Function-EV-Board)
# Adds a LittleFS-backed `tsdb` partition for esp_tsdb time-series storage.
# Empty offset column = auto-allocate (ESP-IDF computes sequentially).
#   app0       3 MB     OTA slot A (larger for P4 — esp_hosted + many sensors)
#   tsdb       8 MB     LittleFS for time-series data (full retention)
